landing.heroDescription: A platform where ideas become products. Build a team, complete tasks — get tokens.

steps.step1Description: Describe the project, set a token budget, and open recruitment for the team.
steps.step2Description: Find an interesting project, apply, and get tasks immediately.
steps.step3Description: Internal task manager. Close a task — tokens in your account.
steps.step4Description: 20% of the profit from a successful project supports the token ecosystem.
